name: Yorkshire Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and salt slightly with a fork.
2. Gradually add flour, beating until smooth.
3. Slowly add milk, a little at a time, until the batter is smooth and has the consistency of a thin pancake batter.
4. Let the batter stand for 1 hour.
5. Preheat the oven to 425°F (220°C).
6. Heat 2 tablespoons of beef fat in an oven-safe baking pan until hot.
7. Pour the batter onto the hot fat in the prepared pan.
8. Bake for 20 minutes or until golden brown and puffed.
Perfect accompaniment to Rib Roast!
